chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4206 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.20172/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.20173/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.17321/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025 Mr. Salman J. Mirza, advocate for the petitioner. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
